# TeeAhead

TeeAhead is Metro Detroit's commission-free golf tee time booking platform. Free tee sheet software for golf courses (zero barter tee times, zero commissions). Loyalty memberships for golfers starting at $89/yr — cheaper than GolfPass+.

## For Golfers

- [Golfer Waitlist](https://www.teeahead.com/waitlist/golfer): Join the waitlist for Metro Detroit launch
- Fairway tier: $0 forever — book tee times at partner courses, earn Fairway Points at 1x per dollar spent
- Eagle tier: $89/yr — 250 bonus Fairway Points on signup, 1 complimentary round/yr, always-on booking fee waiver, 2x Fairway Points, 48hr priority booking, 1 guest pass/yr, 10% birthday credit
- Ace tier: $159/yr — 500 bonus Fairway Points on signup, 2 complimentary rounds/yr, 3x Fairway Points, 72hr priority booking, 2 guest passes/yr, 15% birthday credit

## For Golf Courses

- [Founding Partner Application](https://www.teeahead.com/waitlist/course): First 10 courses get first year free
- Course #11 onward: $349/month flat, no long-term contract, cancel anytime
- Includes: live tee sheet, booking engine, Fairway Points loyalty system, analytics, waitlist management, integrated payments
- Zero barter tee times — courses keep 100% of their tee times and all golfer data
- GolfNow charges courses approximately $94,500/year in barter tee times; TeeAhead charges $0

## GolfNow Comparison

- [GolfNow Alternative](https://www.teeahead.com/golfnow-alternative): Full comparison for courses and golfers — includes Windsor Parke Golf Club case study (382% online revenue increase after leaving GolfNow)
- [Barter Calculator](https://www.teeahead.com/barter): Calculate what GolfNow barter costs your course annually
- [Damage Report](https://www.teeahead.com/damage): Calculate total historical GolfNow barter cost across all years on platform

## Company

- Founded: 2026
- Location: Metro Detroit, Michigan (Oakland, Macomb, and Wayne counties)
- Founders: Neil Barris (neil@teeahead.com) — previously built Outing.golf; Billy Beslock (billy@teeahead.com) — Ford Motor Company background, Metro Detroit golfer
- Support: support@teeahead.com
- Legal: TeeAhead, LLC
